ATTY. FRED M. FELLER OF THE LAW OFFICES OF BURESH, KAPLAN, JANG & FELLER, TEL. NO.

RULING - A R G U E D; Defendants James Giller, Barbara Wheeler, Frank Wheeler, Stuart Jacobson, Brendan Quilan, Elizabeth Quinlan, Brennan Zerbe AND Marilyn Zerbe's Motion To Dismiss Action IS GRANTED; PLAINTIFF HAS OFFERED NO VALID EXCUSE FOR FAILING TO DO ANYTHING TO MOVE THIS CASE FORWARD IN THE MORE THAN 3 YEARS SINCE IT WAS FILED OTHER THAN SERVING DEFENDANT'S JUST BEFORE THE MANDATORY 3 YEAR DEADLINE.
